title: cyperus nutans subsp. subprolixus
intro: Cyperus nutans subsp. subprolixus, also known as the nut sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus nutans subsp. subprolixus include reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tonics, or capsules.
